series.curator_notes: German children's music compilation series by artist Simone Sommerland. Primarily themed song collections (Kinderlieder) rather than narrative Hörspiele. Features numbered sub-series ('Die 30 besten...', 'Die 100 besten...') with volume numbers or year identifiers on some albums. Notable spin-off 'Hörchi & Kucki' and various 'Megamix' releases. Includes multilingual editions (Dutch: 'De 30 beste Kinderliedjes', English: 'The 30 Greatest Songs for Children'). Most releases are standalone seasonal or thematic compilations; volume numbers are inconsistent and may indicate either sequential volumes or release years.

review.notes: Major curation fix: 19 Hörspiel episodes were incorrectly excluded as 'duplicates' when they are actually missing episodes from the series 'Der tierische Kindergarten'. Verified all have proper Hörspiel structure (Inhaltsangabe, multiple parts, Outro, Lamp und Leute label). Also added Episode 12 which was missing from Spotify search results due to different artist attribution ('Der tierische Kindergarten' instead of 'Simone Sommerland'). After these changes, series should have episodes 1-54 complete (except possibly some gaps like 39, 40, 41 which may need verification). Series title should potentially be renamed to 'Der tierische Kindergarten' as that's the actual Hörspiel series name - Simone Sommerland is the artist/performer.

verification.concerns: Minor note: The series name in Spotify shows 'Der tierische Kindergarten' as the album series title (visible in track names as 'Der tierische Kindergarten Titelsong/Schlusssong'), while Simone Sommerland is the artist. The current ID uses the artist name which is acceptable, though the series could potentially be named 'Der tierische Kindergarten' for clarity. All included episodes (35 + 19 overrides = 54) appear to form a complete sequence from Episodes 1-54 with consistent structure.

override_verdicts.reason: Verified - proper Hörspiel structure with Inhaltsangabe, multiple parts, title song, and outro. This is Episode 1 of 'Der tierische Kindergarten' series.
Verified - proper Hörspiel structure, correctly part of the series. Episode 3.
